title: Add #battleforge community channel: auto-create on install, route 4 events, join-nudge UX
description: Implements the approved plan at ~/.claude/plans/how-does-the-store-enumerated-falcon.md. Bot creates and joins #battleforge on install per workspace. Routes player:levelup, achievement:unlock (broadcast-flagged), run:end (CASHED_OUT), and guild.shop.refresh to the channel. Migrates guild.announcement.delivered from DM fan-out to channel-only. Adds one-time ephemeral join nudge for non-members with sticky decline. Touches: slack manifest scopes, Prisma schema (Workspace.battleforgeChannelId, SlackUser tracking fields), TrackingInstallationStore, new event/action handlers, four publishers, guild-crier path.
